title: Noteblock Decrementer
description: Adds a new operator item, used to decrement a note blocks tone when shift clicked
body:
A friend asked me if I could make an item that decreases the tone of note blocks. So I added the "Noteblock Decrementer" :).
##
The item lowers the tone of a note block when shift clicked.
Clicking the block without holding down shift will still increase its tone, as interaction with a noteblock is prioritized over item usage.
